CREATE TABLE test (v Variant(UInt64, String, Array(UInt64))) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE TABLE test2 (id UInt32, v Variant(UInt64, String));
WITH (SELECT count(*) FROM test2) AS cnt SELECT id, variantType(v) FROM test2 WHERE cnt > 2;
CREATE TABLE test3 (id UInt32, v Variant(Int32, Float64, Array(String))) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test3 VALUES (1, NOT NULL), (2, 3.14), (3, ARRAY('A', 'B', 'C'));
SELECT id, toTypeName(variantType(v)) AS type_name FROM test3 ORDER BY id DESC;
CREATE TABLE test4 AS test3 ENGINE = Memories;
INSERT INTO test4 SELECT * FROM test3 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test3 WHERE variantType(v) = 'UInt64');
SELECT id, v, variantType(v) FROM test4 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test2 WHERE variantType(v) = 'String');
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test4) AS total SELECT id, variantType(v) AS type FROM test4 WHERE total > 3 ORDER BY type;
SELECT id, variantType(v) AS type FROM test4 WHERE type NOT IN (SELECT toTypeName(variantType(v)) FROM test2);
